creator: sec@42.org
text:
Hi,
 
 diff looks good. Changes to Protocol::WebSocket are:
 
 | 0.00906 2011-10-30
 | 
 |  - Support draft-ietf-hybi-17
 | 
 | 0.00905 2011-10-03
 | 
 |  - Fixed Firefox 7 Connection issue (reported by Rajstennaj Barrabas)
 |  - Fixed random mask generation
 |  - Fixed 64bit detection
